name: zeitwerk-mcp-server
description: MCP server bridging Claude Desktop to the Zeitwerk local HTTP API
long_description:
Zeitwerk is a time tracking and invoicing app for freelancers. This extension connects Claude Desktop directly to the Zeitwerk app running on your machine, letting you log hours, manage projects and customers, generate earnings reports, and create invoices — entirely through natural language, without ever leaving your conversation.

All data stays on your device. The extension communicates exclusively with the Zeitwerk local API on 127.0.0.1:27432; nothing is sent to any external server.

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Get a dashboard summary: today's hours, this week's hours, this month's hours and earnings, and outstanding invoice totals.

tools.name: update_customer
tools.description: Update an existing customer. Only supply the fields you want to change.

tools.name: get_projects
tools.description: List all active projects. Optionally filter by customer_id.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a new project for a customer.

tools.name: update_project
tools.description: Update an existing project. Only supply the fields you want to change.

tools.name: get_time_entries
tools.description: Get time entries for a date range. Returns hours, description, project, customer, and amount per entry.

tools.name: update_time_entry
tools.description: Update an existing time entry's hours or description.

tools.name: get_invoices
tools.description: List invoices. Optionally filter by status: 'unpaid' or 'paid'.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create a new invoice with line items.

tools.name: update_invoice
tools.description: Update an invoice — typically to mark it as paid.

tools.name: get_invoice_pdf
tools.description: Download an invoice as a PDF. Returns the local file path where the PDF was saved.

tools.name: import_time_entries
tools.description: Import time entries from an Excel (.xlsx, .xls) or CSV (.csv) file. All entries are assigned to the specified project.
